name: E-commerce Hybrid AI-Human Chat System with Live Agent Handoff

options.systemMessage: You are a helpful e-commerce customer support assistant. Answer questions about products, orders, shipping, returns, and general inquiries. Be friendly, professional, and concise. If you cannot help with something, politely let the customer know.

parameters.query: INSERT INTO pending_messages (session_id, message, created_at, replied) VALUES ($1, $2, NOW(), false) RETURNING id
SELECT ai_enabled FROM chat_sessions WHERE session_id = $1 LIMIT 1
INSERT INTO chat_sessions (session_id, ai_enabled) VALUES ($1, $2) ON CONFLICT (session_id) DO UPDATE SET ai_enabled = $2

parameters.message: Your message has been queued for a human agent. Someone will respond shortly.

parameters.query: SELECT id, session_id, message FROM pending_messages WHERE id = $1 AND replied = false LIMIT 1
UPDATE pending_messages SET replied = true, replied_at = NOW() WHERE id = $1
SELECT id, session_id, message, created_at FROM pending_messages WHERE replied = false ORDER BY created_at DESC

nodes.name: Get row(s) in sheet in Google Sheets
